# History & Politics

Articles covering historical events and political developments of 2010.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [2010 Haiti Earthquake](haiti-earthquake.md) | A magnitude 7.0 earthquake struck near Port-au-Prince on January 12, killing an estimated 100,000–316,000 people and displacing 1.5 million in one of the deadliest natural disasters of the twenty-first century. |
| [Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill](deepwater-horizon-oil-spill.md) | The April 20 explosion on BP's Deepwater Horizon rig caused the largest accidental marine oil spill in history, releasing 4.9 million barrels into the Gulf of Mexico over 87 days. |
| [Arab Spring / Tunisia Jasmine Revolution](arab-spring-tunisia.md) | Mohamed Bouazizi's December 17 self-immolation in Sidi Bouzid sparked protests that toppled Ben Ali's government on January 14, 2011, and ignited the wider Arab Spring. |
| [2010 Copiapó Mining Accident and Rescue](chilean-mining-rescue.md) | A cave-in at the San José mine trapped 33 miners 700 meters underground for 69 days; all were rescued alive on October 13 in a globally watched operation viewed by an estimated 1 billion people. |
| [2010 Pakistan Floods](pakistan-floods.md) | Unprecedented monsoon flooding from late July inundated about one-fifth of Pakistan, affecting roughly 20 million people and causing over $10 billion in damage in one of the century's largest natural disasters by people affected. |
| [WikiLeaks Diplomatic Cables Release](wikileaks-cables.md) | WikiLeaks began publishing 251,287 classified U.S. State Department cables on November 28, exposing candid diplomatic assessments worldwide in the largest disclosure of classified U.S. documents to that point. |
| [2010 FIFA World Cup](fifa-world-cup-2010.md) | The first World Cup staged on the African continent ran from June 11 to July 11 in South Africa; Spain beat the Netherlands 1–0 in the final to win their first title. |
| [Eyjafjallajökull Eruption](eyjafjallajokull-eruption.md) | The April 14 eruption of Iceland's Eyjafjallajökull volcano sent ash across European airspace, forcing a six-day shutdown that cancelled roughly 104,000 flights and stranded about 10 million passengers. |
| [2010 Thai Political Crisis](2010-thai-political-crisis.md) | The Red Shirt movement occupied central Bangkok for two months until a May 19 military crackdown killed at least 91 people and wounded over 1,800, the bloodiest street confrontation in modern Thai history. |
| [Deepwater Horizon — Macondo Well Permanently Capped](deepwater-horizon-macondo-well-capped.md) | On September 19, after 152 days, the Macondo well was permanently sealed by a relief-well "bottom kill," ending the largest accidental marine oil spill in history and triggering a sweeping overhaul of U.S. offshore-drilling regulation. |
| [2010 Chile Earthquake](2010-chile-earthquake.md) | A magnitude 8.8 megathrust earthquake and Pacific tsunami struck off the Maule coast on February 27, killing 525 people — among the strongest earthquakes ever instrumentally recorded, yet contained by Chile's rigorous building codes. |
| [2010 Winter Olympics (Vancouver)](2010-winter-olympics-vancouver.md) | Canada hosted the Winter Games on February 12–28 and became the first host nation to top the gold-medal count with a record 14 golds; Sidney Crosby's overtime goal won men's hockey gold before 114 million viewers worldwide. |
| [Smolensk Air Disaster](smolensk-air-disaster.md) | A Polish Air Force Tu-154 crashed in dense fog near Smolensk on April 10, killing all 96 aboard — including President Lech Kaczyński and his wife — en route to commemorate the Katyn massacre, eliminating much of Poland's senior leadership. |
| [2010 United States Midterm Elections](2010-us-midterm-elections.md) | Republicans gained 63 House seats on November 2 — the largest swing since 1948 — retaking the chamber, while the Tea Party movement reshaped the Republican Party and the decade's political trajectory. |

<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
